response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js — a mismatch with the core C++ requirement. His open-source GIS work is promising but not aligned with routing tiling or real-time traffic integration.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) used by NGOs
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages and systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Recent roles centered on TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency systems or map tile optimization
Career gap and lack of recent exposure to distributed systems or navigation data infrastructure
